course_description.overview: Gran fondo through the scenic Clare Valley wine region north of Adelaide, featuring undulating roads with multiple short climbs amid vineyards and countryside.

key_segments.name: Mintaro Climb
key_segments.description: Steady ascent through historic village with vineyard views.

key_segments.name: Sevenhill Rollers
key_segments.description: Series of punchy hills in wine country.

key_segments.name: Return to Clare
key_segments.description: Fast descent and flat run to finish line.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Moderate challenge with consistent climbing suited to strong amateurs; rewarding scenery offsets the elevation.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Adelaide Airport (2-hour drive north); shuttles often available from event organizers.
logistics.accommodation: Abundant wineries, B&Bs, and hotels in Clare town; book early for race weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Online via Cycling Classics; early bird entry around AUD 100-150; multiple distances often offered.
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bikes recommended; bike shops in Clare for servicing; transport bags via event support.
logistics.local_considerations: Summer heat possible (25-35°C); wine region - enjoy tastings responsibly post-ride.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier gran fondo blending Clare Valley's wine country beauty with solid road challenge.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Gran fondo enthusiasts seeking scenic rides with climbs, wine lovers, and South Australian cyclists.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the unbeatable scenery-to-effort ratio and post-ride winery vibes.
pro_tips: Stay hydrated in Aussie summer sun.
Opt for shorter distances if new to fondos.
